t: Preliminary studies exist for CBD, but insufficient for clinical recommendation; THC may exacerbate anxiety or trigger panic attacks.
Myth 9: You will have to use antidepressants for life
After remission 12 months; then gradual discontinuation possible; restart if relapse.
Myth 10: "Electroconvulsive therapy is effective in refractory GAD"
ECT is not indicated for GAD; in refractory cases — medication change, combination, atypical antipsychotic adjunct.
